lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਵਡਾ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: haumai rog vaddaa sansaar |
lines.english: The world is suffering from the terrible disease of egotism.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਭਰਪੂਰਿ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad rahiaa bharapoor |7|
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, He is pervading and permeating everywhere. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਦੇਇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aape bakhase dee piaar |
lines.english: God Himself forgives, and bestows His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਏਹੁ ਰੋਗੁ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te ehu rog jaae |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, this disease is cured.

lines.translit: naanak saache saach samaae |8|1|3|5|8|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Truth, the mortal remains immersed in the True Lord. ||8||1||3||5||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਮਲਾਰ ਛੰਤ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: raag malaar chhant mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Raag Malaar, Chhant, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਪਨੇ ਜਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: apane jan sang raate |
lines.english: His humble servants are imbued with His Love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਦਿਨਸੁ ਰਾਤੇ ਇਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਮਨਹੁ ਨ ਵੀਸਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jan sang raate dinas raate ik nimakh manahu na veesarai |
lines.english: He is imbued with His servants, day and night; He does not forget them from His Mind, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤਿ ਕੇ ਦਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: preetam prem bhagat ke daate |
lines.english: My Beloved Lord is the Giver of loving devotional worship.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਪਾਲ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੰਗੇ ਸਰਬ ਗੁਣ ਜਗਦੀਸਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: gopaal gun nidh sadaa sange sarab gun jagadeesarai |
lines.english: He is the Lord of the World, the Treasure of virtue; He is always with me. All glorious virtues belong to the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਲੀਨਾ ਚਰਨ ਸੰਗੇ ਨਾਮ ਰਸਿ ਜਨ ਮਾਤੇ ॥
lines.translit: man mohi leenaa charan sange naam ras jan maate |
lines.english: With His Feet, He has fascinated my mind; as His humble servant, I am intoxicated with love for His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਸਦਹੂੰ ਕਿਨੈ ਕੋਟਿ ਮਧੇ ਜਾਤੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak preetam kripaal sadahoon kinai kott madhe jaate |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, my Beloved is forever Merciful; out of millions, hardly anyone realizes Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮ ਤੇਰੀ ਗਤਿ ਅਗਮ ਅਪਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: preetam teree gat agam apaare |
lines.english: O Beloved, Your state is inaccessible and infinite.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਪਤਿਤ ਤੁਮੑ ਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa patit tuma taare |
lines.english: You save even the worst sinners.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਸੰਗੇ ਭਜੁ ਨਿਸੰਗੇ ਰਂਉ ਸਦਾ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: santasange bhaj nisange rnau sadaa antarajaameea |
lines.english: In the Society of the Saints, vibrate and meditate on Him with commitment forever; He is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਤਿਤ ਪਾਵਨ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾ ਸਿੰਧੁ ਸੁਆਮੀਆ ॥
lines.translit: patit paavan bhagat vachhal kripaa sindh suaameea |
lines.english: He is the Purifier of sinners, the Lover of His devotees, the Ocean of mercy, our Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਰਸ ਪਿਆਸ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਆਪਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਸਮੑਾਰੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak daras piaas har jeeo aap lehu samaare |2|
lines.english: Nanak is thirsty for the Blessed Vision of Your Darshan, O Dear Lord; please take care of him. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਜਨਮ ਭ੍ਰਮੰਤ ਜੋਨੀ ਤੇ ਨਾਮ ਸਿਮਰਤ ਤਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kott janam bhramant jonee te naam simarat taare |
lines.english: Those who wander in reincarnation through millions of births, are saved and carried across, by meditating in remembrance on the Naam.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਮਨੁ ਲੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: har charan kamal man leenaa |
lines.english: My mind is absorbed in the Lotus Feet of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲ ਮੀਨ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜੀਉ ਏਕ ਤੂਹੈ ਭਿੰਨ ਆਨ ਨ ਜਾਨੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: jal meen prabh jeeo ek toohai bhin aan na jaaneeai |
lines.english: O Dear God, You alone are the water and the fish. I know that there is no difference between the two.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਜਲ ਜਨ ਤੇਰੇ ਮੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh jal jan tere meenaa |
lines.english: O God, You are the water; Your humble servants are fish.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਜੁ ਸਾਧਸੰਗੇ ਏਕ ਰੰਗੇ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਗੋਬਿਦ ਦੀਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: bhaj saadhasange ek range kripaal gobid deenaa |
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, vibrate and meditate with love on the One Lord of the Universe, who is Merciful to the meek.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਹਿ ਭੁਜਾ ਲੇਵਹੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਤਉ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦੀ ਮਾਨੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: geh bhujaa levahu naam devahu tau prasaadee maaneeai |
lines.english: Please take hold of my arm and bless me with Your Name. I am honored only by Your Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਾਥ ਨੀਚ ਸਰਣਾਇ ਨਾਨਕ ਕਰਿ ਮਇਆ ਅਪੁਨਾ ਕੀਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: anaath neech saranaae naanak kar meaa apunaa keenaa |3|
lines.english: Nanak, the lowly and helpless, seeks the Sanctuary of the Lord, who in His Kindness has made him His Own. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮ ਭੰਜਨ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhram bhanjan har raaeaa |
lines.english: Our Sovereign Lord King is the Destroyer of fear.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਸ ਕਉ ਆਪੁ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aapas kau aap milaaeaa |
lines.english: He unites us with Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਚਰਜ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਅੰਤਰਜਾਮੀ ਮਿਲੇ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਿਆਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: aacharaj suaamee antarajaamee mile gun nidh piaariaa |
lines.english: My Wondrous Lord and Master is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts. My Beloved, the Treasure of virtue, has met me.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਾ ਮੰਗਲ ਸੂਖ ਉਪਜੇ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਤ ਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: mahaa mangal sookh upaje gobind gun nit saariaa |
lines.english: Supreme happiness and peace well up, as I cherish the Glorious Virtues of the Lord of the Universe.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਸੋਹੇ ਦੇਖਿ ਮੋਹੇ ਪੁਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: mil sang sohe dekh mohe purab likhiaa paaeaa |
lines.english: Meeting with Him, I am embellished and exalted; gazing on Him, I am fascinated, and I realize my pre-ordained destiny.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨਵੰਤਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਨਿ ਤਿਨ ਕੀ ਜਿਨੑੀ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: binavant naanak saran tin kee jinaee har har dhiaaeaa |4|1|
lines.english: Prays Nanak, I seek the Sanctuary of those who meditate on the Lord, Har, Har. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਰ ਮਲਾਰ ਕੀ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਰਾਣੇ ਕੈਲਾਸ ਤਥਾ ਮਾਲਦੇ ਕੀ ਧੁਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: vaar malaar kee mahalaa 1 raane kailaas tathaa maalade kee dhun |
lines.english: Vaar Of Malaar, First Mehl, Sung To The Tune Of Rana Kailaash And Malda:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਮਨੁ ਰਹਸੀਐ ਜਿਉ ਵੁਠੈ ਧਰਣਿ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: gur miliai man rahaseeai jiau vutthai dharan seegaar |
lines.english: Meeting with the Guru, the mind is delighted, like the earth embellished by the rain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਦਿਸੈ ਹਰੀਆਵਲੀ ਸਰ ਭਰੇ ਸੁਭਰ ਤਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: sabh disai hareeaavalee sar bhare subhar taal |
lines.english: Everything becomes green and lush; the pools and ponds are filled to overflowing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰੁ ਰਚੈ ਸਚ ਰੰਗਿ ਜਿਉ ਮੰਜੀਠੈ ਲਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: andar rachai sach rang jiau manjeetthai laal |
lines.english: The inner self is imbued with the deep crimson color of love for the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਮਲੁ ਵਿਗਸੈ ਸਚੁ ਮਨਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਹਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: kamal vigasai sach man gur kai sabad nihaal |
lines.english: The heart-lotus blossoms forth and the mind becomes true; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, it is ecstatic and exalted.
